entry.title: Head Office & Branch in Customer Master
entry.content:
Dear,

Whenever we are booking customer (branch) invoice which is getting booked on head office id. This should not happen as per our requirement. say Branch customer--10 which is linked to parent/head office 50. whenever we are booking invoice/receipts, system posting to 50. To avoid this, there is an option of selecting + before the branch customer so that it pops whether you wan to go with head office or remove that so that it can post to Branch only by removing Head office number in the popup.

I have created a test case in the attached document from system.

Kindly help to setup the invoice and payments to Branch only whereas head office is required only for reporting purpose.

 

Thanks

entry.title: S4产生多张折旧凭证，ECC只有一张
entry.content: S4产生多张折旧凭证，ECC只有一张折旧凭证，用户不希望分多张折旧凭证

entry.title: Unabel to do Partial capitalization in KO02
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While maintaining Settlement rule in KO02 getting error "Total percent = 50% (Set. Type FUL/Version / Actual settlement ).

We want to do partial capitalization of Asset but unable to do so. Please find attached error screenshot of the same.

entry.title: Asset Accoutning is going live in 2026, however there are some assets which were purchased in 2025.
entry.content:
Asset accounting set up is done in 2026 and is going live in Jun 2026.  There are some assets purchased in 2025 and want them to capitalize in 2026 however the depreciation start date would be 2025. I have proposed Asset migration procedure.  The Assets should be created by using AS91 Tcode and post the APC and Accumulated depreciation till Dec 2025 via Take over values option and post a manual journal entry.  Below is the proposed entry :

Asst Account Dr

Accumulated Depreciation Account Cr

Asset Migration account Cr.

After posting the above entry the balance which is laying in Asset Migration account, I have proposed to move asset migration account balances to retained earnings account.

However, client is asking a different approach.  Client is saying instead of the above process.  Capitalize the assets using AS01, the capitalization date should be 23rd April 2025 and depreciation start should be 23rd Aprils 2025 and post the entire depreciation from April 2025 to May 2026 in Jun 2026 depreciation run.  Is this approach doable?  If yes, how?

entry.title: Substitution rule reference bkpf-xref by PO number
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are going to do self invoicing for PO with periodic invoicing plan using tile create invoicing plan settlement (MRIS). It is working fine, however to allow our supplier to know what was paid we would like to fill the PO number in the field BKPF-XREF for the accounting document of the MM invoices.

I created a substitution rule on header level with prerequisite tcode = MRIS with a user exit. The rule is correctly triggered how the reference is not fed. Here is the user exit

"

form u301.
  data(lv_mm_invoice) = conv belnr_d( bkpf-xblnr ).

  if lv_mm_invoice is initial.
    return.
  endif.

  select distinct ekpo~ebeln,
                  fplt~afdat,
                  fplt~fkdat
    from fplt
           inner join
             ekpo on  ekpo~fplnr = fplt~fplnr
                  and ekpo~loekz = @Space
               inner join
                 rseg on  rseg~ebeln = ekpo~ebeln
                      and rseg~belnr = @LV_mm_invoice
    where fplt~afdat <= @SY-DATUM
      and fplt~fksaf  = @c_inv_plan_item_status-open
    into table @DATA(lt_po_invoicing_dates).

  if sy-subrc <> 0.
    return.
  endif.

"

It is not working because  bkpf-xref is not filled with the MM document directly but with value "*MM". So is there please another way to get the PO number ? Or to get the MM document number to get the PO ?

Do you please have any other suggestion on how to fill the PO number in bkpf-xref ? Knowing that according sap documentation rules on complete document don't work with fiori

Best regards

entry.title: F881 doesn´t work properly
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to retire an asset using transaction F881,but the result is not as expected

We are getting this error:AA816. Transaction type doesn´t exist

Best Regards,

entry.title: Note 3754927 S4CORE
entry.content:
HI team ,

 

Need to know the note 3754927  is applicable for S4CORE version 108 or not ?

entry.title: Is there any program to synch the ACDOCP cost element category 42 values to CO tables in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

We tried to transfer the values from ACDOCP to CO tables by using the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP and we got the  error message.

entry.title: New Asset Class Created – Depreciation Not Calculating as per Standard System Behavior
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have created the new asset class and verified that all the required data, including the depreciation key, useful life, depreciation areas, and related configurations, are properly maintained in the system.

However, despite all the necessary settings being in place, the system is still not calculating depreciation automatically.

Kindly review the issue and advise on any additional settings or requirements that may be causing this behavior so that we can proceed accordingly.

entry.title: The new DMEE format IT_CGI_XML_CT Italy new legal requirement ISO20022 in ECC system.
entry.content: Business requested to implement the new DMEE format IT_CGI_XML_CT which is specific to Italy New legal requirement ISO20022 in ECC. Currently the standard CGI_XML_CT is assigned to IT country which needs to be replaced by IT_CGI_XML_CT. Kindly advise if any SAP notes needs to be implemented to have this standard DMEE format (IT_CGI_XML_CT) in ECC system.

entry.title: Direct Extract Option Not Available in T-Code S_ALR_87012277
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are unable to find the Direct Extract option in the standard transaction code S_ALR_87012277 in the PS4-100 system.

Could you please check and confirm whether this option is available in the system, or advise if any additional configuration or authorization is required to access it?

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Megha S. Patil

entry.title: Periodenselektion nicht mehr möglich
entry.content: Im S4 System ist die Periodenselektion in S_ALR_87013015 nicht mehr vorhanden, im R3 war sie noch da.

entry.title: CN72 is not capturing the ECP Data for PS Projects.
entry.content:
The current snapshot functionality available through transaction CN72 does not capture Easy Cost Planning (ECP) entries from the CKIS table.

To address this limitation, we are considering developing a custom program that extracts CKIS table entries and stores them in a custom Z-table, along with relevant date and timestamp information. 
This solution would enable us to maintain historical snapshots and support comparison with live data in Fiori reports.

We would appreciate your guidance on whether there are any standard SAP options available to capture snapshots of Easy Cost Planning (ECP) data.

If no standard solution exists, please confirm whether proceeding with the custom approach—capturing CKIS records along with date and timestamp in a Z-table—would be appropriate.
Additionally, we would like to highlight a concern regarding the potential growth of records in the snapshot table over time.

We would appreciate recommendations on how to efficiently manage data volume and ensure optimal performance as the dataset increases, Approx. Data Volume 1Million Records per Month.
with the Retention Period of 18Months to pull the data frequently and show the same in the Comparision Reports.

entry.title: Compound Interest calculation for Vendor Downpayment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently for ROW system we calculate Interest on Vendor Downpayment Linear Interest whereas our requirement to clculate Compouned Interest. Upon checking the OSS we found there are Notes for same 2858152 - New Interest Calculation Type: Compound Interest Calculation .

Request you to kindly check & suggest.

entry.title: F-92 : error AAPO190 avoid asset sales
entry.content:
We need to sales an asset to a customer but transaction F-92 is not allowing to manage this due to warning message AAPO190.

Asset NBV is equal to 25K ARS and is going to be sold for 30K ARS.

How F-92 is recorded :

- First item on customer BP with posting Key 01 and amount 30K ARS

- Then offsetting item on Clearing Account for Revenue from Asset Sale with posting key 50

> Here assign cost center (same as asset to be sold) and flag tickbox 'Asset retirement'; then enter asset number to be sold and tick option 'Complete retirement'

> At that time system is raising warning message AAPO190 and avoid to post document (tickbox 'Asset retirmeent' is reset);.

> Then as per KBS 3094563; we did change asset screen layout to maintain Functional Area in related asset masterdata but field remains greyout in transaction AS02.

entry.title: Add a New Sort Level for New Sort Variant for the S_ALR_87011990 Report
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We'd like to add the "Asset Main No. Text" field in the Asset master to a new Sort variant for the Asset history sheet (report S_ALR_87011990) using the t-code OAVI.

Could you please guide us which table field name can be mapped to this field?

entry.content: Request for KP26 Change Log Details

entry.title: Asset Accounting Fiori App –Result set for query 2CCFASTBALANCE is empty in Asset Balances (F1617)
entry.content:
While executing the Asset Accounting Fiori application Asset Balances (F1617), the report does not return any data and displays the following message:

"Result set for query 2CCFASTBALANCE is empty"

entry.title: Standardformular FPAYM_DE_DTAZV ist unvollständig
entry.content:
Guten Tag sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

bei der Umstellung des Formates DTAZV auf pain 001.001.09 (XML-basierte Datei), stellten wir fest, daß das alte SAP-Standardformular  FPAYM_DE_DTAZV unvollständig ist - siehe Anhang. Gibt es ein neueres Formular für DTA-Begleitschreiben?

Oder wird das alte überarbeitet?

Für weitere Fragen, stehe ich gerne zur Verfügung.

Danke und Gruß

Eugen Lutz

entry.title: How are users validated in OB57 (Assign Users to Tolerance Groups) without an F4 help list?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I was configuring Tolerance Groups for Users using transaction code OB57 (Assign Users to Tolerance Groups).

When trying to assign a tolerance group to a specific user, I noticed that the User field does not provide a standard F4 search help list to select existing users defined in the system.

For example, in FS00, where we can assign a tolerance group to GL account master data.

I have a few questions regarding how OB57 handles this:

  1. Why SAP does not provide an F4 search help for the User ID field in OB57?

  2. How does the system validate the User ID entered in this field?

  3. What is the best practice to ensure we do not enter incorrect User IDs?

Thank you!
